evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring following all Vue skill rules

assertions.description: Uses <script setup lang='ts'>, not Options API
Total and taxed price computed via computed(), not inline in template
Uses defineProps<{}> and defineEmits<{}> with TypeScript generics
v-html either removed or uses DOMPurify
v-for uses :key with stable identifier (product.id), not the object itself
Opposite v-if conditions replaced with v-if/v-else pair
Complex expressions (reduce, tax calc) moved from template to script
Page-level view uses components (ProductCard, CartSummary, etc.), not raw HTML/CSS
product-card__row repeated 3x extracted into a component
Cart state and side effects extracted into a composable (useCart or similar)
Price formatting logic in utils, not inline in template/component
Data flows via props, updates via emits — not provide/inject for parent-child
provide/inject NOT used for parent-child — only for deep tree if needed
v-model only used for true two-way form controls, not general state
No unnecessary Suspense, KeepAlive, or v-memo added without justification
